title: Special Security Force
overview: In the future, terrorism in Japan has become commonplace, and the police have become as brutal as the criminals. A member of the Special Security Force, known as Angel, is the best of the best and will stop at nothing in her fight for justice.

title: The Disfigured City
overview: Psychic hunters and a covert government group stalk the security force.

title: The Death Warrant
overview: With the leader of the Red May in the custody of the SSF, details begin to emerge of a sinister high-level, governmental conspiracy that threatens the future of Japan from within.

title: Pain
overview: The actions of Lucifer and the psychic hunters plague the SSF.

title: Wrath of the Empire
overview: With Angel and the SSF trapped, Lucifer plots to destroy cyborg Raiden with her psychic powers.

title: Doomsday
overview: With most of the SSF destroyed, Angel must face Lucifer alone.
